concept: Devise a turn-based tactical game where units exist as quantum possibilities until observed by enemy forces, allowing simultaneous planning of multiple contradictory strategies. Probability troops can move through seemingly solid obstacles until observation collapses their position, but unpredictable quantum effects occasionally manifest when wave functions resolve unexpectedly. Environmental hazards can force premature waveform collapse, requiring contingency planning and strategic use of quantum uncertainty. Advanced tactics involve intentionally creating quantum entanglement between units to ensure coordinated operations regardless of how individual probabilities resolve. The campaign culminates in a battle across multiple timelines where strategic success requires maintaining advantageous positions across all possible quantum outcomes simultaneously.
